stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P05 Coverage Debt 与 As-of

value.user_value: A Coverage-Debt + As-of history query base over the 2016+ backfilled corpus (A0 waves + A1 provinces): a coverage API that shows which (source, month) cells are complete vs the concrete debt (169 explained holes, 0 unexplained), an as-of query that returns the version known as of any date with 0 future-version leakage across 693 samples, and a historical manifest resolver that never returns a future month's manifest.
value.why_it_matters: This is the ground-truth completeness + point-in-time layer the T048 gap gate deferred to. It is what lets the system honestly answer 'is 2016+ complete here?' and 'what did we know as of that date?' without leaking hindsight -- the base for a deep, long-term-stable historical view.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a deterministic query base over cached corpus -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (coverage API + as-of query + historical manifest resolver; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
